first_principles_burden.vs_s12_s13_futures: different asset class, universe, mechanic family -- orthogonal.
first_principles_burden.vs_s15_s14_cross_sector_terminal: opposite thesis (momentum continuation vs mean-reversion); clears T-FORBID-16/17/18.
first_principles_burden.vs_s16_d1_absolute_trend_terminal: RELATIVE cross-sectional ranking, not absolute Donchian breakout; no channel/trailing-stop; long-only rotation. Clears T-FORBID-19/20/21 and T-FORBID-22 (locked params; pre-committed unsearched folds; no per-fold refit).

first_principles_edge_design_LOCKED.exit_design: relative-rank rotation: a held name exits when it leaves the top-M (no trailing/ATR stop)
first_principles_edge_design_LOCKED.expected_effect_HYPOTHESIS_NOT_CLAIM: recent relative winners continue to relatively outperform (Jegadeesh-Titman/Asness premium); rotates into each regime's leaders -> may persist across K13 folds (structural answer to s16 absolute-trend single-OOS failure). TESTED at P6 IS + P6.7 K13; NEVER asserted.
first_principles_edge_design_LOCKED.selection_design: rank 24, hold top-M=6 equal-weight; express the cross-sectional momentum premium with diversified concentration (~8 sectors)
first_principles_edge_design_LOCKED.signal_design: 126-21 trailing total return (skip-month); first-principles, NOT tuned

framework_k13_binding: walk-forward persistence (framework SEAL 52a3b60; report_seal 4268d6f7...); binds s17+; s17 is the FIRST candidate under it
inherited_constraints_block_C6: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades >= 100 total; OOS >= 50/y; no relaxation at any phase. K9-per-fold/OOS is THE PRIMARY kill-risk for this low-turnover rotation.

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-reference 52a3b60): locked rule positive in >=3 of 5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds + aggregate net>0 + K9 (per-fold OR aggregate); P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Fold boundaries LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL (DA22).
K9-per-fold/OOS shortfall under the LOCKED monthly cadence = TERMINAL BLOCK, NOT a tuning trigger; a different cadence/lookback/M is a SEPARATE fresh candidate_record_id.

RELATIVE-MOMENTUM-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): signal=126-21 trailing return (skip-month); select top-M=6 equal-weight; exit=loss of relative rank (no trailing/ATR stop). Hypothesis (winners continue) tested at P6 IS + P6.7 K13, never assumed.
Momentum params L=126 / S=21 / M=6 / R=21(monthly) first-principles JUSTIFIED (not tuned) and LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL (DA6/DA8/DA10/DA11).
DA3 equal-weight 1/M sizing; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; cash-equity cost_drag clears strong margin.
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse DR9-passed CSVs; switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN.
24-name broad universe LOCKED at PLAN; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 24 by REUSE (sealed d86e5d1; result_seal 85667ab3); NO fresh fetch; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent.
A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING (24 names ~8 sectors); NOT the candidate's risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
s16/s15/s14/s13/s12 terminal preserved verbatim; this candidate is FRESH cross-sectional momentum; clears T-FORBID-16..22; NOT re-evaluated under K13.
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters first-principles justified at SEAL, NOT grid-searched; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; the 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.

k9_reachability_at_seal.binding_note: K13's K9-component permits per-fold OR aggregate (aggregate clears). The standalone P10 OOS K9 >=50/y is a SEPARATE binding gate and is the candidate's PRIMARY kill-risk. A shortfall = TERMINAL K9-block, NOT a cadence-tune (different cadence = fresh candidate). The binding edge axis remains K1/K2 per-fold + K13 persistence.
k9_reachability_at_seal.is_status: CLEARS aggregate over the IS span
k9_reachability_at_seal.oos_p10_status: AT RISK -- monthly top-6 rotation may NOT clear the standalone >=50/y OOS floor (~24-72 over 2y)

k_gates.K1_sharpe_proxy_lt_0: FAIL_SAFETY at S1 (binding edge gate; per-fold + aggregate)
k_gates.K9_closed_trades_lt_100: INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE; INVIOLATE. OOS >=50/y. THE PRIMARY KILL-RISK
